summary: Pet Life Operating System with MOJO, Weather Card, and Why For Pet features tested and verified. All requested features are working correctly on /mira-demo route. Weather API returns correct data (28°C for Mumbai with CAUTION level).

weather_card.details: Shows 28°C • Mumbai with CAUTION safety level badge

weather_safety_level.details: CAUTION badge displayed with amber/yellow styling

mojo_modal.details: Opens when clicking pet avatar, shows real data

sections.soul_profile: 44% - Temperament: Friendly, Energy: High energy, With People: Excited

why_for_pet_badges.details: Enhanced generateWhyForPet function in ChatMessage.jsx (line 191-271) includes:
personalization_types: Breed-specific (Maltese/Poodle: eye care, coat; Golden: joints; Labrador: weight)
Product category fallbacks (treats, grooming, food, toys, beds)

multi_pet_switching.details: 7 pets available (Lola, Mystique, Bruno, Luna, Buddy, Meister, TestScoring)
multi_pet_switching.switch_button: Switch Pet button in MOJO modal

alerts: How is Lola doing? - health check
Senior Joint Care - cold weather alert

minor.issue: Some pillar picks fetch calls failing (dine, fit, celebrate, care) - returns 404

critical_code_review_comments: Weather API correctly handles nested structure: current_weather.temperature (not temp at root)
generateWhyForPet function has comprehensive personalization logic covering allergies, breeds, age, and product categories
WhyForPetBadge.jsx has separate export of generateWhyForPet function with identical logic to ChatMessage.jsx
Route mapping: /mira -> MiraPage (simple), /mira-demo -> MiraDemoPage (full OS with Weather Card, MOJO, etc.)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 7 pets
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pet Life Operating System features verified on /mira-demo route. Weather Card shows 28°C Mumbai with CAUTION level. MOJO modal opens correctly with real pet data. 7 OS navigation tabs working. Why For Pet badges use enhanced generateWhyForPet function with breed/allergy/age-specific personalization.

key_findings.route_note: /mira-demo is the correct route for testing Pet OS features, NOT /mira
